# Copilot Instructions

This is **tushar-portfolio** — a personal portfolio built with Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

## Stack
- Next.js (App Router) + TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- framer-motion (animations)
- next-themes (dark/light mode)
- clsx + tailwind-merge (class utilities)
- lucide-react (icons)

## Conventions
- Absolute imports use `@/*` mapped to `./src/*`
- Components live in `src/components/`
- Utility functions live in `src/lib/`
- Global styles live in `src/styles/`
- App routes live in `src/app/`

## Theme Tokens
Color tokens are defined in `src/styles/globals.css` as CSS custom properties under `:root` and `.dark`.
